summary: Tested P0 bug fix for campaign images in WhatsApp. All 12 backend tests PASSED. Frontend tests verified: campaigns display images, campaign form has image upload/URL fields, ChatPage renders images inline from [Imagen:] pattern. Fixed missing FileResponse import in server.py.

minor.issue: FileResponse was not imported - FIXED by adding import

critical_code_review_comments: FileResponse import was missing in server.py line 2 - FIXED during testing
seed_data_creation: Created test leads and campaigns during testing, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix verified: 1) POST /api/upload-image works and returns /api/uploads/{filename}, 2) GET /api/uploads/{filename} serves images correctly (after FileResponse import fix), 3) POST /api/campaigns creates campaigns with image_url, 4) POST /api/campaigns/{id}/send records [Imagen: url] in chat_messages, 5) ChatPage.jsx line 569-580 correctly parses [Imagen:] pattern and renders images inline. WhatsApp API is NOT configured in preview so actual WA sends are skipped but message recording works.

verified_features.image_serve: PASS - GET /api/uploads/{filename} serves image correctly (after fix)
verified_features.campaign_list_with_image: PASS - GET /api/campaigns returns campaigns with image_url
verified_features.frontend_campaigns_page: PASS - Shows campaigns with image previews
verified_features.frontend_chat_page_images: PASS - Renders images inline from [Imagen:] pattern

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Campaigns with images sent URLs as plain text instead of multimedia WhatsApp messages
bug_fix_verification.fix_location: server.py line 2848-2854 - local image URLs now resolved with PUBLIC_URL env var
bug_fix_verification.chat_page_fix: ChatPage.jsx line 569-580 - renders images inline when content contains [Imagen:]
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: VERIFIED - Images display correctly in chat and campaigns page
